user.title: Add LIXIL Shutter
user.description: Select a nearby LIXIL shutter or enter its BLE address.

confirm.title: Confirm device
confirm.description:
Found **{name}** ({address}) — product type: {product_type}.

Click **Submit** to pair the shutter now.

pair.title: Retry pairing
pair.description: Click **Submit** to retry pairing the shutter.

error.device_not_found: Shutter not found — make sure it is powered on and in range.
error.pairing_failed: Pairing failed. Make sure the shutter is nearby and in pairing mode, then try again.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the logs for details.

abort.not_in_pairing_mode: This shutter is not in pairing mode. Hold the remote pairing button for 5–10 seconds until the LED flashes to enter pairing mode.
